message:
fix(tui): resolve clippy derivable_impls + broken saved search test

- Replace manual Default impls with #[derive(Default)] + #[default]
  attribute on ScreenMode::AltScreen and SessionPhase::Idle
- Fix search_saved_shortcuts_cycle_and_queue_actions test: was using
  SearchQueryClient (no saved searches) instead of TestQueryClient
  (provides 3 saved searches), causing assertion failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
